overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character exploring a dark, industrial nightclub. The environment features intense red and cyan neon lighting, crowded dance floors, and a cyberpunk aesthetic with exposed industrial ceilings and holographic signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor leading to nightclub entrance

events.description: approaching the metal security gate marking the entrance to the main club area

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow industrial corridor toward the club entrance, passing red neon signage

notable_agents.action: bouncer or patron standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: large red neon sign with partial text 'METR' visible on the right wall
vertical metal bars forming a security checkpoint at the corridor end
dark industrial concrete walls with pipes and red emergency lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with red neon signage. The camera moves forward toward a metal security gate that marks the entrance to the nightclub, with the glow of the interior bar becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar with neon lighting and seated patrons

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into brightly lit bar area with red and cyan neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking along the bar counter, observing patrons seated on stools and the bartender working

notable_agents.action: female patron in white pants standing at the bar counter
male patron in black jacket sitting on bar stool drinking

entered.detail: long bar with glowing orange underlighting and metal railings
tall metallic bar stools with patrons seated
tall vertical strips of intense red LED lights flanking the bar
holographic skull symbols and cyan neon tubes above the bar shelves

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main bar area, revealing a long counter with orange underlighting and patrons seated on stools. Vertical red LED pillars and holographic skull signage illuminate the space as the character moves along the bar, passing various NPCs engaged in conversation and drinking.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor with stage and dynamic lighting

events.description: turning away from the bar and entering the open dance floor area
overhead spotlights and stage lighting becoming prominent with smoke effects

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded dance floor toward the stage, passing dancing NPCs

notable_agents.action: female dancer with arms raised in the air near the stage

entered.detail: elevated stage with DJ booth and large holographic screens at the far end of the club
ceiling with exposed beams, pipes, and truss structures holding lighting rigs
array of white spotlights creating beams through the smoke

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bar behind, the scene opens into a spacious dance floor filled with moving crowds. The camera turns toward a distant stage where a DJ performs under dramatic overhead spotlights. Smoke effects and industrial ceiling structures become visible as the character moves deeper into the crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: front stage area with DJ booth and LED screens

agents.ego_description: approaching the DJ stage through the dense crowd, moving toward the performance area

notable_agents.action: dancer with green hair moving near the stage barriers

entered.detail: close-up view of the DJ equipment, turntables, and performer silhouette
large illuminated screen displaying abstract visuals behind the DJ
metal railings separating the stage area from the dance floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the front stage area where the DJ performs. The crowd density increases significantly as the camera moves past metal barriers toward the DJ booth. Large LED screens and intense red lighting dominate the view, with the industrial ceiling structure still visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a crowded nightclub. It begins in a dimly lit hallway marked by red neon signage, moving forward through a metal security gate as the glow of the interior bar emerges in the distance. As the camera enters the main bar area, the space opens up to reveal a long counter with orange underlighting and vertical red LED pillars, passing patrons and holographic skull signage. The scene then shifts from the bar into a spacious dance floor filled with moving crowds and smoke effects, with the camera turning toward a distant stage under dramatic overhead spotlights. Finally, the movement pushes deeper into the dense crowd and past metal barriers, ending at the DJ booth beneath large LED screens and intense red lighting.
